tasks.method: Horizontal bar chart with Department.DName on the y-axis and student counts on the x-axis. Color encodes division (AS/EN) via Department.Division. Supports filtering via I1’s multi-select interaction.
tasks.objective: Visualize departmental enrollment distribution to identify dominant academic divisions and popularity trends

tasks.method: Bipartite heatmap with rows as major departments (DName) and columns as minor departments. Color intensity encodes frequency of major-minor pairs. Tooltips show exact counts.
tasks.objective: Reveal hidden associations between primary majors and secondary disciplines

tasks.method: Grouped bar chart with Department.DName on x-axis and average GPA (via grade conversion) on y-axis. Error bars show standard deviation. Bars grouped by student Sex for cross-analysis.
tasks.objective: Compare academic performance across departments while assessing gender-based discrepancies

tasks.method: Force-directed network graph: Nodes represent departments (DName), edges encode advisor-student connections. Node size = faculty count, edge thickness = student count. Color partitions by division.
tasks.objective: Map institutional organization by analyzing advisor-department alignment with student majors

tasks.method: Proportional symbol map with geographic markers (city_code). Symbol size encodes student count per location, color links to primary department division (AS/EN). Linked to Task 1 via brushing.
tasks.objective: Explore geographical distribution of students and potential correlations with academic divisions

tasks.method: Parallel coordinates plot: Axes = Age, Department.DName (major), Credits sum. Brushing highlights cohorts with similar academic profiles.
tasks.objective: Identify student clusters based on age, major workload, and extracurricular involvement
